prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: FLL-H1IAAS-1-2 Product Type: AIMING_SCOPE_SIGHT Brand (from catalog): Flatline-Ops Existing Title: Flatine-Ops 1 inch Rifle Scope Bubble Level Articulating Dual Position Precision Shooter Optics Level Description: LEVEL WHATEVER FIELD YOU'RE PLAYING ON

Flatline Ops smallest diameter scope level, fitting 1" scope diameters. A long-range shot has many factors to take into consideration to be sure you are on target, and our ACCU/LEVEL system aids in the correction of "cant error," giving you dead-on true vertical hold. The level also features a dual-position detent locator to make sure you are locked into place before taking that critical shot.

SOLID, DURABLE CONSTRUCTION

Each level is machined from advanced 6061-T6 aircraft aluminum and then black hard anodized to protect it from the extremes of the outdoors. The level is also designed to fit right- or left-handed shooters.

HIGH VISIBILITY

High-visibility fluorescent fluid level is easy to visualize and locate before each shot. You also have the ability to make fine adjustments to the level in the open and closed positions.

Each ACCU/LEVEL comes complete with a Dovetail Accessory Lug for fast and easy addition of the Flatline Ops STRONG ARM. If you have different size levels on multiple firearms, the STRONG ARM and ADI accessories are interchangeable with every ACCU/LEVEL size.

Quick and easy installation
Install without removing scope (in most cases)
Ships with instructions and all installation tools Search Terms: 30mm scope level bubble level for 34mm rifle scope tube long range shooting competition precision shooting 35mm scope tube level optics accessory hunting accessories Features: - SPECIFICATION: Universal Fit for 1 inch Rifle Scope | Width: .625" | Material: 6061-T6 Hi-Grade Aircraft Aluminum | Finish: Black Hard Anodized - ACCURATE: Flatline-Ops articulating rifle scope 1 inch bubble level ensures proper rifle position and alignment at sight level which is critical to achieving long range accuracy - EFFORTLESS EASE OF USE: Rifle scope mount articulate in two positions for optimal line of sight while using high visibility fluorescent fluid - LOW-PROFILE DESIGN: Rifle scope tube mount bubble level is designed to flip open and be used when needed within eye sight, without adding weight or unintended bulk - MADE IN USA: Machined to the highest quality standards; Includes manufacturer warranty and all mounting hardware is included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Flatline-Ops 1 inch Rifle Scope Bubble Level

openai.item_name: Flatline-Ops 1in Black Rifle Scope Bubble Level

anthropic.title_differentiation: Articulating Dual Position, Aircraft Aluminum, High Visibility Fluorescent, Made In USA, Long Range Precision

openai.title_differentiation: 6061-T6 Aircraft Aluminum, Dual-Position Detent, Fluorescent Fluid, Low-Profile, Right Or Left Handed, Made In USA
